features.name: UTC → 中国标准时间 全局替换
features.description: Replace all datetime.utcnow() with cst_now() across 20+ files, add +08:00 suffix to API responses, Flutter .toLocal() for display
features.evidence: 新建 utils.py (cst_now/cst_isoformat), 修改 20 个文件共 30+ 处, 后端序列化加 +08:00 后缀, Flutter 加 .toLocal(), 三端编译通过

features.name: C-end homepage redesign
features.description: Complete rewrite of home_page.dart with 5 sections: gradient banner, welcome card, hotel highlights grid, facility list, footer info
features.evidence: home_page.dart 完全重写 (498 insertions, 64 deletions), 5个区块: Banner渐变+欢迎卡片+亮点网格+设施列表+底部信息, dart analyze 0 issues

features.name: C端全页面 UI 重构 (蓝色主色调)
features.description: Full UI rewrite of all 9 C-end pages with blue #2563eb primary color, dark gradient backgrounds, service tracking timeline, scene mode logic
features.evidence: dart analyze 0 errors. 11 files重写: home_page/room_control/ai_chat/work_order/my_page/bill_detail/facility/login/change_password/bottom_nav + 删除LoginBottomSheet. 蓝色#2563eb主色调, 深色渐变背景, 服务追踪时间线, 场景模式逻辑

features.name: Bug fixes: 用户管理住客数据 + C端首次登录改密无反应
features.description: Fix two bugs: user management page not showing guest data (role=guest→type=guest), and C-end first-login password change not responding

bugs.desc: 用户管理看不到C端住客数据
bugs.root_cause: 前端用 role=guest 查住客，后端用 type=guest 区分

bugs.desc: C端首次登录改密后点击确认没反应
bugs.root_cause: GoRouter redirect 在 LoginBottomSheet 处理改密前就跳转到 /change-password，弹窗被关闭
bugs.fix: app.dart 移除 passwordChangeRequired 自动跳转; change_password_page.dart 加 context.go('/home')

features.name: 人脸识别登录
features.description: B 端开房时录入人客人脸并匹配身份证，C 端通过刷脸+活体检测登录。使用阿里云 API 实现人脸检测/比对/活体检测/搜索，人脸数据存储在阿里云人脸库

人脸 API 路由 (backend/app/api/face.py) — detect/verify/register/search
B 端摄像头拍照组件 (frontend/src/pages/front-desk/FaceCapture.tsx)
CheckInModal 集成人脸录入 (OCR+比对+注册)
C 端刷脸登录页面 (smartstay-flutter/lib/pages/login/face_login_page.dart)
AuthBloc 支持 AuthFaceLoginRequested 事件
后端 py_compile + pytest 通过
前端 tsc --noEmit 通过

bugs.root_cause: Stale uvicorn process on port 8000 serving old code without face router
bugs.fix: Kill all Python/uvicorn processes on port 8000 and restart cleanly

bugs.root_cause: create_face_db() never called on startup, so AddFace/SearchFace always failed
bugs.fix: Added create_face_db() to startup lifespan in main.py

features.name: C 端 AI 聊天增强
features.description: 3-phase enhancement: Phase 1 UX (stop button, typing indicator, tool status, quick chips), Phase 2 features (Markdown, interactive cards, voice input, multi-session history), Phase 3 refactor (SSE extraction, typed cards, ChatBloc split)
evidence: Phase 1 UX: stop/cancel button, typing indicator (3-dot animation), tool call loading status, context-aware quick chips
Phase 2 Features: Markdown rendering (flutter_markdown), interactive business cards with navigation, multi-session history (backend GET /sessions + frontend SessionListPage)
Phase 3 Refactor: SSEStreamHandler (typed ChatStreamEvent sealed class), ChatCard model (enum + fromJson), ChatStreamService (HTTP+SSE extraction from ChatBloc)
New files: typing_indicator.dart, quick_chips.dart, chat_card.dart, session_list_page.dart, chat_card.dart (model), sse_stream_handler.dart, chat_stream_service.dart
Backend: GET /api/ai/chat/sessions endpoint added
Dependencies: flutter_markdown, record, permission_handler added to pubspec.yaml
flutter analyze passes on all files
features.notes: Voice input (阿里云 ASR) deferred to follow-up. All 12 tasks across 3 phases completed.

features.name: AI Agent 高级优化
features.description: 3-phase backend optimization: code quality (dead code cleanup, parallel tools, WS dedup, intent classification fix), multi-step agent loop (MAX_ITERATIONS=5 with ToolMessage feedback), conversation memory (last 10 messages to LLM)
evidence: Phase 1: Removed dead code (classify_node, process_input_node), parallel tool execution (asyncio.gather), extracted _broadcast_work_order and _execute_single_tool helpers, split intent keywords into strong/weak
Phase 2: action_node rewritten with MAX_ITERATIONS=5 loop, ToolMessage feedback to LLM, loop exits when LLM stops calling tools
Phase 3: chat_node passes last 10 messages, knowledge_node passes last 5 messages + RAG context
py_compile passes on all changes
Only graph.py and tools.py modified, C-end Flutter unaffected

features.name: C 端语音输入 (阿里云 ASR)
features.description: Voice input for C-end AI chat: long-press mic button to record, release to transcribe via Aliyun ASR, text fills chat input. 6 tasks: backend config + ASR service, backend transcribe endpoint, Flutter VoiceService, Flutter BLoC events/state, Flutter BLoC recording logic, Flutter mic button UI
evidence: Task 1: Backend config (ALIYUN_AK_ID, ALIYUN_AK_SECRET in settings.py) + AliyunASR service (backend/app/aliyun/asr.py)
Task 2: Backend POST /api/ai/chat/transcribe endpoint (accepts audio file, returns text)
Task 3: Flutter VoiceService (lib/core/voice_service.dart) — Record package integration, permission handling
Task 4: Flutter ChatBloc events (VoiceInputRequested, VoiceInputCancelled, VoiceInputCompleted) + state (isRecording, isTranscribing, voiceError)
Task 5: Flutter ChatBloc recording logic — onRecordingComplete calls VoiceService.transcribe, auto-fills messageController
Task 6: Flutter mic button UI — long-press gesture, recording animation (pulsing red), transcription loading state
py_compile passes on backend changes
flutter analyze passes (no new errors from voice input code)

Modified files: backend/app/core/settings.py, backend/app/aliyun/asr.py, backend/app/api/ai.py, smartstay-flutter/lib/core/voice_service.dart, smartstay-flutter/lib/blocs/chat/chat_bloc.dart, smartstay-flutter/lib/pages/ai_chat/ai_chat_page.dart
features.notes: Voice input deferred from F014 (C-end AI chat enhancement), implemented as standalone F016
